# Marien's 11-Year Journey - Project Setup

## Project Overview
React + Tailwind CSS cinematic romantic webpage celebrating Marien Muturi's 11-year journey with Type 1 Diabetes. Features Framer Motion animations, smooth scrolling, blue-themed glassmorphism, and emotional storytelling.

## Progress Checklist

- [x] Verify copilot-instructions.md exists
- [x] Scaffold the React + Tailwind + Framer Motion project
- [x] Customize components (Hero, Timeline, Resilience, Gallery, etc.)
- [x] Install required extensions
- [x] Compile the project and resolve issues
- [x] Create and run dev task
- [x] Launch the project
- [x] Final documentation and cleanup

## Project Stack
- React 18+ with Vite
- Tailwind CSS
- Framer Motion (animations)
- React Scroll Smooth (smooth scrolling)
- Responsive mobile-first design

## Key Features
- 8 immersive sections with emotional storytelling
- Blue-themed glassmorphism design
- Cinematic animations and transitions
- Interactive timeline of Marien's journey
- 11 Reasons flip cards
- Memory gallery with Polaroid effects
- Love letter section with typewriter animation
- Fully responsive design
